Frequently Asked Questions

What are the best moves for Incineroar in Pokemon Champions VGC 2026?

The top moves for Incineroar in Pokemon Champions VGC 2026 are Fake Out (41.092%), Parting Shot (21.185%), Flare Blitz (19.934%), Darkest Lariat (11.004%). These represent the highest usage percentages on the competitive ladder.

What are the best teammates for Incineroar?

Incineroar synergizes well with Sinistcha (31.618%), Archaludon (23.763%), Whimsicott (23.736%), Farigiraf (21.876%). These Pokemon frequently appear on teams together and cover each other's weaknesses.

What item should I use on Incineroar?

The most popular items for Incineroar are Sitrus Berry (8.305%), Rocky Helmet (2.046%), Figy Berry (0.669%). The best choice depends on your team composition and strategy.

What ability is best for Incineroar?

The most common abilities for Incineroar are Intimidate (60.647%) and Hospitality (1.289%). The choice often depends on your team's strategy.

Is Incineroar good in Pokemon Champions VGC 2026?

Incineroar is currently ranked in the Pokemon Champions VGC 2026 metagame. Check the usage percentage and teammates section to see how well it performs. The data is aggregated from thousands of high-level ranked battles.
